items.title: # Summarize Emails Quickly
items.content: Ask AI to summarize long emails into bullet points. This helps you grasp key information fast without reading every detail.

items.title: # Format Data Tables
items.content: Input raw data and tell AI to organize it into a table. This saves time on manual formatting for reports or presentations.

items.title: # Brainstorm Idea Lists
items.content: Generate ideas for content or projects by asking AI for a numbered list. It provides structured inspiration instantly.

items.title: # Create Meeting Agendas
items.content: Prompt AI to create a clear meeting agenda with specific sections. This ensures all key topics are covered efficiently.

items.title: # Project Breakdown Plan
items.content: Give AI a big project and ask it to list the key stages and actions needed. This helps you see the whole picture and tackle it one step at a time.

items.title: # Solve Issues Stepwise
items.content: When facing a problem, ask AI to outline potential causes and a step-by-step troubleshooting guide. This provides a clear path to finding a solution efficiently.

items.title: # Outline Your Content
items.content: Before writing, ask AI to create a detailed outline for your topic. Then, expand on each point, ensuring logical flow and comprehensive coverage.

items.title: # Learn Anything Easily
items.content: To grasp a new topic, prompt AI to explain it in simple, sequential steps. This breaks down complex information into digestible, easy-to-understand parts.

items.title: # Format Data Fast
items.content: Show the AI 2-3 examples of how you want your data formatted, then give it your messy data. It will follow your pattern precisely, saving you manual effort.

items.title: # Summarize Specific Style
items.content: Provide a couple of examples of how you like summaries (e.g., short bullet points). Then, ask it to summarize new text in that style.

items.title: # Brainstorm Creative Ideas
items.content: Give the AI two examples of the type of ideas you're looking for. It will generate new, similar ideas following your examples more accurately.

items.title: # Rewrite With Tone
items.content: Show the AI a few sentences rewritten in your desired tone. Then, ask it to rephrase your text, mimicking that tone perfectly for consistent output.

items.title: # Summarize My Inbox
items.content: Ask AI to act as an executive assistant. Give it a long email and instruct it to summarize key points into a brief bullet list, saving you reading time.

items.title: # Generate Content Ideas
items.content: Tell AI to be a creative marketing specialist. Ask for five social media post ideas about a specific topic, getting fresh angles fast.

items.title: # Format Data Instantly
items.content: Instruct AI to act as a meticulous data entry clerk. Provide unorganized text and ask it to neatly organize it into a table format for clarity.

items.title: # Simplify Complex Topics
items.content: Ask AI to take on the role of a patient teacher. Give it a complex concept and request a simple explanation, tailored for a beginner to understand easily.

items.title: # Summarize Your Emails
items.content: Tell AI to "Act as a professional summarizer." Paste a long email and ask for main points. This quickly gets you the core message, saving valuable reading time.

items.title: # Generate Fresh Ideas
items.content: Prompt AI with "Act as a creative marketing expert." Ask it to brainstorm new ideas for your projects. This helps you overcome creative blocks quickly and efficiently.

items.title: # Polish Your Writing
items.content: Instruct AI to "Act as a meticulous proofreader." Provide your text and ask it to check for grammar and clarity. This ensures your writing is always polished and error-free.

items.title: # Organize Raw Data
items.content: Assign AI the role of "data organizer." Give it unformatted information and request it to arrange it into a table. This makes complex data easy to understand at a glance.

items.title: # Track Spending Easily
items.content: Use AI tools to automatically categorize your bank transactions. This helps you quickly see where your money goes without manual sorting.

items.title: # Summarize Market News
items.content: Feed long financial articles into an AI to get quick summaries. Understand market trends faster without reading every detail.

items.title: # Create Smart Budgets
items.content: Ask AI for personalized budget ideas based on your income and goals. It can suggest practical ways to save and manage debt.

items.title: # Plan Trip Itinerary
items.content: Ask AI to create a detailed daily itinerary for your destination, including activities and estimated times. Specify your interests and budget for a personalized travel plan.

items.title: # Find Local Eateries
items.content: Prompt AI for recommendations on authentic local restaurants or hidden attractions near your hotel. Include your dietary preferences or specific interests for tailored suggestions.

items.title: # Generate Packing List
items.content: Have AI generate a packing list based on your destination, trip duration, and planned activities. It can even suggest items based on local weather forecasts.
